title: Today Let S Try Different Art Styles
sourceTitle: Today Let S Try Different Art Styles
prompt: Korean Ink wash painting done on mulberry paper with { SUBJECT }, light and lovely, soft sophistication, floating finesse --w 20 --chaos 11 --ar 16:9 --stylize 250 --style raw
originalPrompt: Korean Ink wash painting done on mulberry paper with { SUBJECT }, light and lovely, soft sophistication, floating finesse --w 20 --chaos 11 --ar 16:9 --stylize 250 --style raw

promptTranslations.zh: 在桑蚕纸上使用朝鲜水墨画技法描绘{ SUBJECT }，光线柔和优美，柔和细腻，漂浮灵动 --w 20 --chaos 11 --ar 16:9 --stylize 250 --style raw
promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

Korean Ink wash painting done on mulberry paper with { SUBJECT }, light and lovely, soft sophistication, floating finesse --w 20 --chaos 11 --ar 16:9 --stylize 250 --style raw
promptTranslations.ru: Корейская живопись тушью на бумаге тутового дерева с { SUBJECT }, легкая и прекрасная, мягкая изысканность, парящая тонкость --w 20 --chaos 11 --ar 16:9 --stylize 250 --style raw
promptTranslations.pt:
Use o prompt em inglês abaixo para gerar a imagem; mantenha textos visíveis, nomes de marca, valores de variáveis e parâmetros em inglês.

Korean Ink wash painting done on mulberry paper with { SUBJECT }, light and lovely, soft sophistication, floating finesse --w 20 --chaos 11 --ar 16:9 --stylize 250 --style raw
promptTranslations.ja: 柿渋紙に描かれた韓国の水墨画、{ SUBJECT }、軽やかで美しく、柔らかな洗練、浮遊感のある優雅さ。--w 20 --chaos 11 --ar 16:9 --stylize 250 --style raw
promptTranslations.ko: 한국 전통 먹그림, 닥나무 종이에 { SUBJECT } 그리기, 가볍고 사랑스러우며 부드럽고 우아한 세련미, 떠다니는 섬세함 --w 20 --chaos 11 --ar 16:9 --stylize 250 --style raw
